title: Online Registration & Document Upload
description: Candidates register online, pay the application fee, and upload their academic and community certificates to the TNEA portal.

title: Document Verification (TFC Centers)
description: Uploaded documents are verified online by officials, or in-person at TNEA Facilitation Centers (TFC) for special cases/discrepancies.

title: Random Number Generation & Rank List Release
description: Anna University generates a random number for tie-breaking, followed by the publication of the official TNEA General and Community Rank List.

title: Online Choice Filling (Round-wise)
description: Based on cutoffs and ranks, students are split into rounds. In each round, students submit their preferred order of colleges and courses.

title: Tentative Allotment & Seat Confirmation
description: Seats are allocated tentatively based on rank and choices. Students must confirm the seat (Accept & Join, Accept & Upward, etc.) to finalize it.
